entity.summary: Doma-chain concentrated-liquidity decentralized exchange and swap surface supporting on-chain token trading and liquidity provision within the DomainFi application ecosystem.
entity.notes: The current first-party Doma application exposes a public swap interface and the official protocol documentation describes Doma Chain and its on-chain DomainFi application layer. No exact launch date or legal jurisdiction is asserted.

evidence.title: Doma application swap interface
evidence.notes: Current first-party Doma application exposes a live Swap surface with token selection, wallet sign-in, bridging, trading, and earning navigation.

evidence.title: Doma Protocol documentation
evidence.notes: Official documentation describes Doma Chain as the on-chain infrastructure for DomainFi applications and programmable settlement across supported blockchains, corroborating the ecosystem context of the exchange surface.
